goal: Orchestrator state machine transitions align with runtime-policy.json tier routing — TRIVIAL skips PLAN_REVIEW, SMALL runs PlanAuditor only, MEDIUM/LARGE runs full pipeline
assertions: Orchestrator PLAN_REVIEW skip logic for TRIVIAL matches runtime-policy.json review_pipeline_by_tier.TRIVIAL
Orchestrator SMALL tier dispatches PlanAuditor but not AssumptionVerifier or ExecutabilityVerifier per runtime-policy.json
Orchestrator MEDIUM tier dispatches PlanAuditor and AssumptionVerifier per runtime-policy.json
Orchestrator LARGE tier dispatches all three review agents per runtime-policy.json
Closed invalidation reruns do not change review_pipeline_by_tier reviewer membership for any tier
Max PLAN_REVIEW iterations match max_iterations_by_tier values in runtime-policy.json
